pre_game.message: Hey, I'm G. It’s getting a bit quiet in here, so I figured I’d say hi—what’s the first thing you’d do if you won the money?
Hey G, I'm J. First thing I’d do is help out my family and make sure they're taken care of. What about you?
Honestly, the same thing—I just want to take some of the pressure off the people I care about and make sure they’re set.
I hear you. It’s a lot of weight to carry, but it’s the best reason to be here. Are you feeling nervous about the game starting?
A little, yeah. It’s hard not to be with so much at stake, but I’m mostly just focused on the goal. How are you holding up?
I'm doing okay, just trying to stay steady. It's definitely a lot of pressure, but I'm ready to get started and see how this goes.
I feel that. Staying level-headed is probably the best way to handle it. Do you have a specific plan for the game, or are you just playing it by ear?
I’m mostly playing it by ear. It’s hard to have a set strategy until we see how everyone else plays. Are you coming in with a plan?
Not really, I think being flexible is the way to go since everything depends on how the group acts once things get moving.
Definitely, it’s all about reading the room once the pressure is on. Best of luck to you, G.
Thanks, J. Good luck to you too—I really hope things work out for you and your family.
